final:
module RefModule (
    input wire [7:0] d,
    input wire clk,
    input wire rst,
    output reg [7:0] q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) begin
        q <= 8'b00000000;
    end else begin
        q <= d;
    end
end

endmodule
